ast.name: title
ast.source: Click for full AI call details
ast.target: 点击查看完整 AI 调用详情

ast.name: title
ast.target: 停止正在运行的 AI 生成。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Asks the configured AI model to propose a title from the filled content.
ast.target: 请求已配置的 AI 模型根据已填写的内容建议一个标题。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Ask the configured AI model to propose a title from the note's content.
ast.target: 请求已配置的 AI 模型根据笔记内容建议一个标题。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 创建新的张力（引导式模态框）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 创建新的基质（引导式模态框）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Free-form input: write anything, the AI figures out if it's a tension or substrate
ast.target: 自由输入：写下任何内容，AI 会判断它是张力还是基质

ast.name: title
ast.source: Opens 'Free-form input' with clipboard text already pasted: the AI classifies as tension or substrate.
ast.target: 打开“自由输入”并已粘贴剪贴板文本：AI 会将其分类为张力或基质。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Substrate da un PDF nel vault (link + spazio per le tue note)
ast.target: 从保险库中的 PDF 提取基质（链接 + 供您记录笔记的空间）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Substrate da un video YouTube: chiede URL, scarica trascrizione (se disponibile)
ast.target: 从 YouTube 视频提取基质：请求 URL，下载转录文本（如果可用）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Run the Contradiction Hunter (scans open tensions + substrate, identifies contradictory pairs)
ast.target: 运行矛盾猎手（扫描开放的张力 + 基质，识别矛盾对）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Stop the running Hunter. (The HTTP request is not interrupted, but the result will be discarded.)
ast.target: 停止正在运行的猎手。（HTTP 请求不会被中断，但结果将被丢弃。）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 在保险库中未找到笔记

ast.name: title
ast.source: Rimuovi il dismiss: la coppia tornera' a essere candidata nei prossimi run del Hunter.
ast.target: 移除忽略：该对将在猎手的下一次运行中重新成为候选。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Asks the AI model to propose the two fields by reading the tension's text.
ast.target: 请求 AI 模型通过阅读张力的文本来建议两个字段。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Asks the AI model to propose the 5 IF/THEN/GREY fields by reading the tension's text.
ast.target: 请求 AI 模型通过阅读张力的文本来建议 5 个 IF/THEN/GREY 字段。

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 关闭 — 无卡片（预摩擦）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 中 — 可折叠卡片（默认）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: High — always open + acknowledge to accept
ast.target: 高 — 始终打开 + 需确认接受

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, Groq, OpenRouter): top quality, per-token cost. Account + API key required.
ast.target: （Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, Groq, OpenRouter）：顶级质量，按 token 计费。需要账户 + API 密钥。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: (LM Studio, Ollama): full privacy, zero cost, variable quality. Requires ~10GB of RAM/VRAM and an initial model download.
ast.target: （LM Studio, Ollama）：完全隐私，零成本，质量可变。需要约 10GB 内存/显存和初始模型下载。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source:
The clipboard looks like a YouTube URL. Download the transcript and create a pre-filled substrate?

OK = download transcript.
Cancel = continue with free input (AI classifies).
ast.target:
剪贴板内容看起来像是一个 YouTube URL。要下载转录文本并创建预填充的基质吗？

确定 = 下载转录文本。
取消 = 继续自由输入（AI 分类）。

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Antinomia] PDF 中心笔记创建/更新失败：

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Antinomia] YouTube 中心笔记创建/更新失败：

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Antinomia] analyzeFreeInput 重试后仍无法解析：

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Antinomia] 猎手重试后仍无法解析：

ast.name: log
ast.source: If randomize option is set to false, then quality option must be 'default' or 'proof'.
ast.target: 如果随机化选项设置为 false，则质量选项必须为 'default' 或 'proof'。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 没有需要垃圾回收的内容

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 将此前提标记为已被削弱

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 预填基础 URL 和建议模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Free-form string (overrides dropdown). Empty = use dropdown.
ast.target: 自由格式字符串（覆盖下拉菜单）。留空则使用下拉菜单。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Suppress this notice for cloud profiles from now on.
ast.target: 从现在起，不再为云配置文件显示此通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick the principle that replaced this note. This closes the tension -> defeated -> principle cycle in the graph.
ast.target: 选择取代此笔记的原则。这将关闭图中的张力 -> 被击败 -> 原则循环。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Copies the file into the vault under attachments/, then processes it.
ast.target: 将文件复制到保险库的 attachments/ 文件夹下，然后进行处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the 'attachments/' folder and sets it as Obsidian's default for new attachments. Keeps the 'notes/' folder (Antinomia notes) clean of binary files.
ast.target: 创建 'attachments/' 文件夹并将其设置为 Obsidian 新附件的默认位置。保持 'notes/' 文件夹（Antinomia 笔记）不含二进制文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When Obsidian starts, automatically show the Antinomia Dashboard in the right sidebar (if not already open).
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时，自动在右侧边栏显示 Antinomia 仪表板（如果尚未打开）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: split (design C, recommended): creates a new principle + converts the tension into defeated, shows a red edge in the graph. transform: changes type in-place (legacy, no edge).
ast.target: 拆分（设计 C，推荐）：创建一个新原则 + 将张力转换为被击败状态，在图中显示红色边。转换：就地更改类型（旧版，无边）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For every principle already in the vault that has the '## Origin (tension)' section in its body, create a retroactive defeated. Run once after enabling split.
ast.target: 对于保险库中所有已存在且正文包含 '## Origin (tension)' 部分的原则，创建一个追溯性的被击败状态。启用拆分后运行一次。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When Obsidian starts, also open the custom Antinomia graph in a main tab (if not already open).
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时，同时在主标签页中打开自定义的 Antinomia 图（如果尚未打开）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change graph palette. Custom = personalized colors below.
ast.target: 更改图配色方案。自定义 = 使用下方的个性化颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Spread nodes much further apart so edges are less likely to cross unrelated nodes. Slower initial layout, cleaner visual. Toggle off to revert to the standard layout.
ast.target: 将节点间距大幅拉开，以减少边交叉无关节点的可能性。初始布局较慢，视觉更清晰。关闭此选项可恢复标准布局。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Static violet/blue/pink nebulae behind the graph (CSS-only, no animation). Turn off for a flat background.
ast.target: 图背后的静态紫罗兰/蓝色/粉色星云（仅 CSS，无动画）。关闭可获得纯色背景。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How much friction every AI output carries.
ast.target: 每个 AI 输出所携带的摩擦力大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 所有 AI 命令的默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave 'use active profile' as default. Override is useful to use a bigger model (e.g. Sonnet cloud) only for the Hunter.
ast.target: 默认保留“使用活动配置文件”。覆盖功能可用于仅为 Hunter 使用更大的模型（例如 Sonnet 云端）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Concise: short 2-3 sentence descriptions, no exposed reasoning, ~3x faster. Verbose: the model shows its reasoning (useful when learning or debugging).
ast.target: 简洁：简短的 2-3 句描述，不暴露推理过程，速度约快 3 倍。详细：模型展示其推理过程（学习或调试时有用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limited by the model's context window.
ast.target: 受模型上下文窗口限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Immediately show the welcome modal with the Antinomia explanation and the 5 layers. Does not change the onboarding status.
ast.target: 立即显示包含 Antinomia 说明和 5 个层级的欢迎模态框。不会更改入门状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A sequence of 7 mini-cards explaining tension, substrate, principle, defeated, presuppositions, Hunter, graph. Navigate with Back/Next.
ast.target: 一系列 7 张迷你卡片，解释张力、基质、原则、被击败、预设、猎人、图。使用后退/前进导航。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-show the hint banners the next time you open Open Tensions and Contradiction Hunter.
ast.target: 下次打开“开放张力”和“矛盾猎人”时，重新显示提示横幅。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets onboardingCompleted = false. The welcome modal will be shown automatically on the next Obsidian launch.
ast.target: 将 onboardingCompleted 设置为 false。欢迎模态框将在下次 Obsidian 启动时自动显示。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Pick a PDF already in this vault
ast.target: 选择此保险库中已有的 PDF

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Check for legacy v1.1 notes at startup
ast.target: 启动时检查旧版 v1.1 笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 张力 → 原则提升模式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启动时打开 Antinomia 图

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每次扫描的最大笔记数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Max chars per note in prompt
ast.target: 提示中每条笔记的最大字符数

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 例如 Sonnet Cloud、Qwen 14B 本地版等...

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Search a PDF in the vault...

ast.name: setText
ast.source: This is a prompt for thinking, not a truth to act on.
ast.target: 这是一个用于思考的提示，并非可采取行动的真理。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: A tension captures a contradiction between two positions. The more incompatible, the more fertile. You'll map the presuppositions later, at your own pace.
ast.target: 张力捕捉了两个立场之间的矛盾。越不相容，越有潜力。你稍后可以按自己的节奏映射预设。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: A complete backup is created first in notes/.antinomia-pre-migration-backup-<timestamp>/. You can undo anytime with 'Antinomia: Restore pre-migration backup'.
ast.target: 首先会在 notes/.antinomia-pre-migration-backup-<timestamp>/ 中创建完整备份。你可以随时使用 'Antinomia: 恢复迁移前备份' 来撤销。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Undo anytime with 'Antinomia: Restore pre-migration backup (latest)'.
ast.target: 随时使用 'Antinomia: 恢复迁移前备份（最新）' 来撤销。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Contextual hint based on the current state of your vault.
ast.target: 基于保险库当前状态的上下文提示。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No concepts extracted. Try again, or the source is too thin.
ast.target: 未提取到概念。请重试，或源材料过于单薄。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Antinomia will extract text from the PDF and ask the AI to propose substrate concepts. You'll preview and pick which to save.
ast.target: Antinomia 将从 PDF 中提取文本，并让 AI 提出基质概念。你将预览并选择要保存哪些。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Paste the video URL. Antinomia will download the transcript (if available) via YouTube's timedtext API.
ast.target: 粘贴视频 URL。Antinomia 将通过 YouTube 的 timedtext API 下载字幕（如果可用）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: YouTube blocks the direct transcript fetch (it requires an authenticated session). Workaround in 3 clicks:
ast.target: YouTube 阻止了直接获取字幕（需要经过身份验证的会话）。3 步变通方法：

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Tip: each tension is a card with quick buttons (Title / Link / Presuppositions / ↑ Elevate / ✓ Resolved / × Defeated). Click the title to open the note. At the top of the sidebar, 4 toolbar buttons: '+ Tension', '+ Substrate', '✨ Free' (AI classifies), '🔍 Hunter'.
ast.target: 提示：每张张力都是一个带有快捷按钮的卡片（标题 / 链接 / 预设 / ↑ 提升 / ✓ 已解决 / × 被击败）。点击标题可打开笔记。侧边栏顶部有 4 个工具栏按钮：'+ 张力'、'+ 基质'、'✨ 自由'（AI 分类）、'🔍 猎人'。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: ⚠ Reflective prompts, not truths. The AI can hallucinate. Do not use to decide in real situations.
ast.target: ⚠ 反思性提示，非真理。AI 可能产生幻觉。切勿用于在真实情境中做决定。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Tip: the Hunter scans open tensions + substrate, and proposes contradictory PAIRS. It does not resolve. Confidence high/medium/low, sorted by quality. × dismisses a false positive (persistent). Below each pair, Elevate/Resolved/Defeated buttons act directly on one of the two notes.
ast.target: 提示：猎人扫描开放的张力和基质，并提出矛盾的“对”。它不负责解决。置信度为高/中/低，按质量排序。× 可驳回误报（持久化）。每对下方，提升/已解决/被击败按钮直接作用于两个笔记中的一个。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: (Sotto: il run precedente, verra' sovrascritto al termine.)
ast.target: （注：上一次运行的结果将在结束时被覆盖。）

ast.name: setText
ast.source: 🎉 You've completed onboarding! From here on it's real work.
ast.target: 🎉 你已完成入门引导！从这里开始就是真正的工作了。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Health report: incomplete or malformed Antinomia notes. Click an issue to open the note and fix it.
ast.target: 健康报告：不完整或格式错误的 Antinomia 笔记。点击问题项可打开笔记并修复。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: ✅ No issues found. Vault is healthy.
ast.target: ✅ 未发现问题。保险库状态健康。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Note del vault senza antinomia_type. Utile per migrare un vault esistente: classifica una per una manualmente o con AI. 'Ignora' aggiunge antinomia_ignora: true (non riapparira'). I file in trash sono esclusi.
ast.target: 保险库中没有 antinomia_type 的笔记。适用于迁移现有保险库：可手动或使用 AI 逐条分类。'忽略'会添加 antinomia_ignora: true（不再出现）。回收站中的文件已排除。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: ✅ Tutte le note del vault sono classificate (o esplicitamente ignorate). Niente da migrare.
ast.target: ✅ 保险库中所有笔记均已分类（或明确忽略）。无需迁移。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No note matches active filters. Enable more layers above.
ast.target: 没有笔记匹配当前活动的筛选器。请在上方启用更多层级。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Write what you have in mind, without worrying about the type. The AI figures out if it's a tension or substrate, extracts the fields, and opens the matching modal pre-filled. You can always refine before saving.
ast.target: 写下你脑中所想，无需担心类型。AI 会判断它是张力还是基质，提取字段，并打开预填充的相应模态框。你始终可以在保存前进行修改。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: A quote, an observation, a doubt, a contradiction you see, a single thought. Anything: the AI figures it out.
ast.target: 一句引言、一个观察、一个疑问、一个你看到的矛盾、一个单独的想法。任何东西：AI 会自行判断。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Antinomia notes have timestamp basenames for ID stability. To see the human title also in the File Explorer, install 'Front Matter Title' from the community and configure it to read the 'title' property.
ast.target: Antinomia 笔记使用时间戳作为文件名以保持 ID 稳定性。要在文件资源管理器中也看到人类可读的标题，请从社区安装 'Front Matter Title' 并将其配置为读取 'title' 属性。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Antinomia uses AI models for the intelligent features (Hunter, propose IF/THEN, presuppositions, classify). Two options:
ast.target: Antinomia 使用 AI 模型实现智能功能（Hunter、提出 IF/THEN、预设、分类）。两个选项：

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 从 YouTube 创建基底 — 提取概念（AI）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Antinomia] AI finish_reason=length — response was truncated. Raise max_tokens.
ast.target: [Antinomia] AI finish_reason=length — 响应被截断。请增加 max_tokens。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Antinomia] Node http unavailable — falling back to requestUrl (no abort).
ast.target: [Antinomia] Node http 不可用 — 回退到 requestUrl（无中止）。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Antinomia] 文件夹创建失败（可能已存在）：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Antinomia] hunter: discarded pair with non-existent basenames:
ast.target: [Antinomia] hunter: 丢弃了包含不存在的基础名称的配对：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Antinomia] openElevateModal: already open, ignoring duplicate request
ast.target: [Antinomia] openElevateModal: 已打开，忽略重复请求

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This is an example. Edit it, or press Cancel to create your own.
ast.target: 这是一个示例。您可以编辑它，或按取消创建您自己的。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Antinomia: no pre-migration backup found to restore.
ast.target: Antinomia：未找到可恢复的迁移前备份。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Map presuppositions: the active note is not a principle.
ast.target: 映射预设：活动笔记不是原则。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Collapse impact: the active note is not a presupposition.
ast.target: 折叠影响：活动笔记不是预设。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Fill the content before requesting a title.
ast.target: 请先填写内容再请求标题。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select at least one concept to create.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个要创建的概念。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请先粘贴转录文本再继续。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Transcript not available for this video (no captionTrack).
ast.target: 此视频无可用转录文本（无 captionTrack）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 解析 captionTracks 时出错（YouTube 格式已更改）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No open tensions or substrate in the vault.
ast.target: 库中没有开放的张力或基底。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: First create at least one tension (step 1).
ast.target: 请先创建至少一个张力（步骤 1）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: At least 2 notes (open tensions + substrate) are needed for the Hunter.
ast.target: Hunter 需要至少 2 个笔记（开放张力 + 基底）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: First create at least one tension.
ast.target: 请先创建至少一个张力。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Free input: model output was prose, retrying with stricter prompt...
ast.target: 自由输入：模型输出为散文，正在使用更严格的提示重试...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Map presuppositions: the active note is not a tension.
ast.target: 映射预设：活动笔记不是张力。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: API key missing in the Hunter profile (or active one). Settings -> Antinomia.
ast.target: Hunter 配置文件（或当前活动配置文件）中缺少 API 密钥。设置 -> Antinomia。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Hunter: model output was prose, retrying with stricter prompt...
ast.target: Hunter：模型输出为散文，正在使用更严格的提示重试...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No dismissal found for this pair.
ast.target: 未找到此配对的驳回记录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Pair already marked as false positive.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Elevate: active note is not a tension.
ast.target: 提升：活动笔记不是张力。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: could not create the principle.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must have at least one profile.
ast.target: 您必须至少拥有一个配置文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Sidebar tooltips reset. The banner will appear next time you open the sidebars.
ast.target: 侧边栏工具提示已重置。下次打开侧边栏时横幅将再次出现。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No example notes in the vault.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Onboarding reset. It will appear on next launch (or click 'Open' above to see it now).
ast.target: 引导流程已重置。它将在下次启动时出现（或点击上方的“打开”立即查看）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Front Matter Title is not installed/enabled.
ast.target: Front Matter Title 未安装/启用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Front Matter Title configured for Antinomia ✓
ast.target: Front Matter Title 已为 Antinomia 配置 ✓

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No orphan principles in the vault.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: At least 2 defeated notes needed in the vault.
ast.target: 库中至少需要 2 个已击败的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Folder created but could not set as default. Configure manually in Obsidian Settings → Files and links.
ast.target: 文件夹已创建，但无法设为默认。请在 Obsidian 设置 → 文件和链接中手动配置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Selection: the note is not a principle.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: could not create the defeated.
ast.target: 错误：无法创建已击败项。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Non puoi unire un defeated con se stesso.
ast.target: 不能将一个已击败项与其自身合并。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: API key missing in the active profile. Settings -> Antinomia.
ast.target: 当前活动配置文件中缺少 API 密钥。设置 -> Antinomia。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Risposta AI non parseable. Vedi console.
ast.target: AI 响应无法解析。请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You can't link a note to itself.
ast.target: 不能将笔记链接到其自身。

ast.name: body
ast.source: You have open tensions and have already run the Hunter. If a tension feels clear enough, elevate it: turn the contradiction into an operational IF/THEN principle. It doesn't mean 'being right', it means 'having understood the contexts'.
ast.target: 您有开放的张力，并且已经运行过 Hunter。如果某个张力感觉足够清晰，可以将其提升：将矛盾转化为可操作的 IF/THEN 原则。这并不意味着“正确”，而是意味着“理解了上下文”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Two positions in conflict (A vs B). The base unit of antinomian thinking.
ast.target: 两个冲突的立场（A 对 B）。反律法思维的基本单元。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Raw material: quotes, facts, observations, reading notes.
ast.target: 原始材料：引文、事实、观察、阅读笔记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Archived beliefs (false positives, superseded, elevated to principle).
ast.target: 已归档的信念（误报、被取代、提升为原则）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A contradiction between two positions A and B that bothers you.
ast.target: 两个立场 A 和 B 之间令您困扰的矛盾。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Raw material: a quote, a fact, a note.
ast.target: 原始材料：一段引文、一个事实、一条笔记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Write any thought: the AI figures out if it's a tension or substrate and extracts the fields.
ast.target: 写下任何想法：AI 会判断它是张力还是基底，并提取相关字段。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Scan the vault to find contradictions even between notes you didn't link.
ast.target: 扫描库以发现甚至您未链接的笔记之间的矛盾。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Turn a tension into an IF/THEN/GREY operational rule (the AI can propose it).
ast.target: 将张力转化为 IF/THEN/GREY 操作规则（AI 可以提出建议）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open 'list substrate', 'list principles' or 'list defeated archive' to see your vault by layer.
ast.target: 打开“列出基底”、“列出原则”或“列出已击败档案”以按层级查看您的库。

ast.name: label
ast.source: Map the presuppositions of a tension

ast.name: label
ast.source: Elevate a tension to a principle

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从剪贴板自由输入（AI 分类）

ast.name: name
ast.source: substrate from PDF (link a vault PDF)
ast.target: 从 PDF 创建基质（链接保险库 PDF）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从 YouTube 创建基质（获取字幕）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从 YouTube 创建基质 — 提取概念 (AI)

ast.name: name
ast.source: find contradictions involving the active note (Hunter focus)
ast.target: 查找涉及活动笔记的矛盾（猎手聚焦）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 迁移现有原则（生成追溯性已击败）

ast.name: name
ast.source: create origin defeated for orphan principle
ast.target: 为孤立原则创建起源已击败

ast.name: name
ast.source: merge two defeated into one (case B)
ast.target: 将两个已击败合并为一个（情况 B）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 导入现有保险库（未分类笔记）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 显示欢迎（重新开始引导）

ast.name: name
ast.source: tell me what to do next (contextual hint)
ast.target: 告诉我接下来做什么（上下文提示）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 创建示例保险库（3 个张力 + 2 个基质）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 编辑 AI 配置文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Heads-up: a cloud profile is active
ast.target: 注意：一个云配置文件处于活动状态

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your notes will be sent to an external AI provider. What that means:
ast.target: 你的笔记将被发送到一个外部 AI 提供商。这意味着：

ast.name: text
ast.source: For full privacy and zero cost, use a local backend (LM Studio or Ollama).
ast.target: 为了完全隐私和零成本，请使用本地后端（LM Studio 或 Ollama）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No principles currently rest on this presupposition.
ast.target: 当前没有原则基于此预设。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click the button below to open youtubetotranscript.com in your browser.
ast.target: 点击下方按钮在浏览器中打开 youtubetotranscript.com。

ast.name: text
ast.source: On the site, the video URL is already pasted. Click 'Get Transcript'.
ast.target: 在该网站上，视频 URL 已粘贴好。点击“获取字幕”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select the whole transcript, Ctrl+C, come back here and paste it in the field below.
ast.target: 选择整个字幕，Ctrl+C，返回此处并粘贴到下方字段中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No open tensions. Create the first one above.
ast.target: 暂无打开的张力。请在上方创建第一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No scan yet. Press 'Run Hunter' or use Ctrl+P.
ast.target: 尚未扫描。请按“运行猎手”或使用 Ctrl+P。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No contradictions detected in this run.
ast.target: 本次运行未检测到矛盾。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No substrate. Raw material (quotes, facts, notes) that can generate tensions.
ast.target: 暂无基底。原始材料（引文、事实、笔记）可用于生成张力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No active principles. Elevate a resolved tension to create one.
ast.target: 暂无活跃原则。请将一个已解决的张力提升以创建原则。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No presuppositions yet. Open a principle and run 'Map presuppositions of this principle'.
ast.target: 暂无预设。请打开一个原则并运行“映射此原则的预设”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: AI backends are configurable as profiles. You can have multiple profiles (e.g. LM Studio local + Anthropic Cloud) and switch which one is active, with optional override for the Hunter.
ast.target: AI 后端可配置为配置文件。您可以拥有多个配置文件（例如 LM Studio 本地 + Anthropic 云），并切换当前激活的配置文件，猎手可选择性覆盖。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 为何需要摩擦？了解更多 →

ast.name: text
ast.source: ℹ AI models: cloud vs local
ast.target: ℹ AI 模型：云端 vs 本地

ast.name: text
ast.source: — localhost is not reachable from this device. To use your home LM Studio / Ollama from mobile, replace localhost with a network-reachable address:
ast.target: — localhost 无法从此设备访问。要在移动设备上使用家庭 LM Studio / Ollama，请将 localhost 替换为网络可达地址：

ast.name: title
ast.source: Example — Creative solitude vs social correction
ast.target: 示例 — 创造性孤独 vs 社会性矫正
